content.text: Let's rename the HttpClient type to ApiClient everywhere. Use ApiClient as the canonical name across the codebase.

summary: This is a single logical rename commit touching several files. I'll do it in one apply_patch.

content.text: Renaming HttpClient to ApiClient across client.rs, handlers.rs, and main.rs in one patch.

payload.name: apply_patch

output.output: Applied patch to 3 files: src/client.rs, src/handlers.rs, src/main.rs

content.text: Done. HttpClient is now ApiClient across all three files in a single commit-sized change.
